A ≈ $8,822.21

Here are the steps to make a peanut butter and jelly sandwich:

1. Gather your ingredients: You'll need one slice of bread, two tablespoons of peanut butter, one can of creamy peanut butter jelly, and a knife for cutting the bread.

2. Toast the bread: Place the slice of bread on a well-greased baking sheet and toast it in a preheated oven until golden brown. This will add flavor and texture to your sandwich.

3. Spread the peanut butter: Using the knife, spread two tablespoons of peanut butter onto one side of the toasted bread.

4. Add the jelly: Slowly drizzle the can of peanut butter jelly over the top of the peanut butter. Use a spatula to gently stir it into the peanut butter, making sure not to get any air bubbles in.

5. Cut the sandwich: Use your knife to carefully cut the sandwich in half, creating two halves.

6. Serve: Enjoy your warm and delicious peanut butter and jelly sandwich!
